underlying_goal: Fix multiple bugs in a web3 finance app: task creation missing feedback (toast system), wallet private key export encoding bug, and add private key import functionality
friction_detail: The automated code-review stop hook triggered 4 times requiring multiple rounds of fixes for edge cases (secureZero cleanup, mock types, duplicate null assignments), extending the session significantly.
brief_summary: User needed toast notifications for task creation, a critical private key encoding bug fixed, and a new wallet import feature planned — all were completed with successful deployments, though the private key import feature was only planned, not implemented.
